description: Simplify the 'DataProcessor' project located in `~/eclipse-workspace/DataProcessor` by removing over-abstracted wrapper methods using inline refactoring. Perform inline refactoring for the following methods: `StringProcessor.trimInput`, `StringProcessor.checkEmpty`, `MathHelper.addValues`, `MathHelper.computeAbsolute`, `DataPipeline.invokeValidation`, and `DataPipeline.wrapResult`. Ensure the project remains compilable and all tests pass. Document the removed methods in a text file at `~/eclipse-workspace/DataProcessor/refactoring_report.txt`.
